steps: Multiply the y factors: y × y = y^{2}.
Multiply the z factors: z × z = z^{2}.
The product is 56y^{2}z^{2}. That matches choice A — A is correct.

choices.explanation: • (8yz)(y)(7z) = 56 · y² · z² = 56y²z². That matches choice A — A is correct.
• This would require only one z factor, but both (8yz) and (7z) contribute a z, giving z². Eliminate B.
• This is missing one y and one z exponent. Eliminate C.
• 8 + 7 = 15, not 16, and even addition is the wrong operation — coefficients multiply. Eliminate D.
